## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, strategies, and workflows for GrowthX's content marketing engagement with Aembit.](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aembit seeks to reduce reliance on paid marketing/events and build a strong organic content pillar](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing existing content and creating new content in emerging category with potential "zero-volume" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise company overview/personas and develop initial content strategy for discussion next week](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3018.0)
  - [Aembit to provide access to analytics, CMS, style guides, and other relevant documentation](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3400.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [GrowthX team: Jakub (lead), David (point of contact), Nico (content writer), Matthew (chief content officer)](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Aembit team: Apurva (CMO), Ashur (technical marketing), Dan (director of content)](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Backgrounds in content marketing, journalism, SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Goals and Priorities

  - [Scale content production and reduce engineering involvement](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Increase organic traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Reduce reliance on paid marketing/events (e.g. RSA conference)](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Own authoritative guides in emerging category](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Optimize existing content, especially technical pieces that have performed well](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

### Current Content Strategy

  - [Four content buckets: category-defining, best practices, technical/engineering insights, product news](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)
  - [Mix of planned and ad-hoc content based on industry trends, customer challenges](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3073.0)
  - [Some technical content from CTO and engineering architect](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3094.0)
  - [Considering more organized approach with quarterly themes](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3145.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [Focus on potential "zero-volume" keywords in emerging category](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Analyze actual traffic vs SEO tool estimates (e.g. Microsoft Graph Authentication blog)](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Balance between known high-volume keywords and emerging topics](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Identify existing content with traffic potential for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Refresh and optimize underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Explore repurposing video/infographic content for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)

### Operational Details

  - [GrowthX to use Notion for documentation, meeting notes, performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute calls (starting with longer strategy session)](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3574.0)
  - [GrowthX team to get access to CMS, analytics, style guides](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3400.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aembit to provide access to CMS, analytics, and relevant documentation](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3400.0)
  - [Aembit to share existing content strategy documents, style guides](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise company overview and persona information](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3018.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy for discussion next week](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3564.0)
  - [Schedule weekly check-in calls](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3574.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content audits and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/qJDSYs557W6v9WjHRssXUcBShb4d5ATx?tab=summary&timestamp=3649.0)
